title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 25–28, this part focuses on Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Zoro, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24, Roger as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Bro! Big bro!! Please say some- thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, hurry up and get him on the boat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: put all of our medicine on his wound!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how many years it takes you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will wait atop this throne for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To make that man, "Hawk eye" Mihawk, say such words...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So forge on ahead with your strong conviction and surpass my sword!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Big bro!! Please, say some- thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: boy... what do you aim for?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You have chosen a trying path.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Even more so than Sur- passing me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I'm gonna do it any- way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's not okay!! But he's alive!! He's just lost con- sciousness, that's all!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 31 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
